about-intro:
Dedicated Full-Stack Developer specializing in high-performance web technologies, modular microfrontends, and enterprise D2C solutions.
Expert in building scalable, real-time architectures with TypeScript, Angular, React, and Node.js/Java backends, with a strong footprint in automotive and fintech domains.
about-tagline: Architects modular microfrontends, scalable real-time backends, and seamless digital automotive portals.
